clip_rule: in every transformer-layer forward pre-hook, values with absolute magnitude above the per-layer/per-token-position 95th percentile over hidden channels are clipped to that threshold while preserving sign

clip_stats.hook_input_token_position: local position in the hidden-state tensor presented to the layer; with cache-based generation, decode forwards usually contain a single local token position
clip_stats.threshold_scope: per layer, per batch element, per forwarded token position, over hidden channels

threshold_scope: per layer, per batch element, per forwarded token position, over hidden channels
